content.hint: 结合个人经历，说明兴趣或动机的来源，避免泛泛而谈

blanks.answer: my undergraduate experience sparked a deep interest in solving real-world problems
options: I like the subject because it's easy
my undergraduate experience sparked a deep interest in solving real-world problems
my parents told me to choose it
everyone around me is doing it

content.situation: 在留学申请面试中，面试官询问你为什么选择这个专业
content.speakerText: Why did you decide to major in this field?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为什么决定选择这个专业？
content.knowledgePoint: 表达专业选择的个人动机

content.hint: 强调学校特色与个人目标的契合，避免表面理由

blanks.answer: its strong focus on practical research matches my career goals
options: it's the most famous school in the country
its strong focus on practical research matches my career goals
the campus looks nice in pictures

content.situation: 在校园开放日，招生官问你为什么选择这所学校
content.speakerText: What made you choose our university over others?
content.speakerTextCn: 是什么让你选择我们学校而不是其他学校？
content.knowledgePoint: 表达学校选择的理性依据

content.hint: 明确表达回国或服务家乡的意图，避免模糊或拖延性回答

blanks.answer: return home and apply what I've learned to improve local industry standards
options: travel around the world for a year
return home and apply what I've learned to improve local industry standards
see if I can find a job abroad
just take a break and think about it

content.situation: 面试中被问到毕业后有何规划
content.speakerText: What are your plans after completing your degree?
content.speakerTextCn: 完成学业后你有什么计划？

content.hint: 表达‘与…契合’的正式动词搭配
content.template: I'm majoring in environmental science because my undergrad thesis focused on urban air quality, and UCLA's research in sustainable cities ___ perfectly with my goals.

content.hint: 推广或执行标准的常用动词
content.template: I'll return to China and join my family's environmental consulting firm to help ___ US-style sustainability standards.

content.hint: 描述海外学习经历的关键词
content.template: My decision to study abroad was driven by a desire to gain ___ experience and bring it back home.
